creator: ari@ish.com.au
text:
I don't have a lot to add here because I'm brand new to galera and haven't reached the point of having it work at all.

Whether this should be a separate port or not, I don't know. However since MariaDB 10.1 now includes the WSREP bits by default (as I understand), does that make it the easiest place to start before tackling mysql and percona?
